channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-07
item.description:
Our community has seen significant activity across multiple projects, with a focus on administrative updates, issue resolutions, and feature enhancements. Notably, the `statcheck` project saw administrative changes, while `docpluck` addressed several issues, including text loss and rendering fixes. Meanwhile, `coarse` re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker, and `escicheck` was synchronized with the `escicheckapp` repository to bring it in line with the latest version of `effectcheck`. Additionally, `auto-zcurve` and `output-it-forward` saw updates, including a revised validation note and the addition of a Chrome Webstore link, respectively. These connections between projects demonstrate the collaborative spirit of our community, and we celebrate the progress being made to enhance our open-source research tools.

66 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck27 commits
metacheck20 commits
regcheck12 commits
escicheck3 commits
statcheck2 commits

item.title: metacheck: 1 commit today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `data_check` branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. The most recent commit on July 7 improved the cache, kept the original data, and made changes to hardcoded folders, as stated in the commit message "improve cache, keep original data, better hardcoded folders". On July 5, fixes for bugs were made, an archive report was added, large GitHub repositories were gated, and feedback was improved, according to the commit "fix bugs, add archive report, gate large github repos, improve feedback". Additionally, updates were made to OSF download and to various functions, with bug fixes also applied, as mentioned in the commits "updates osf download" and "updates to functions, fix bugs". An earlier commit on the same day also referenced "improvements", but the subsequent commits provided more specific details on the changes made.

1 commit(s) today:

  • c799dcf [data_check] improve cache, keep original data, better hardcoded folders — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where "admin updates" were made, as stated in the commit message. The branch `feature-non-apa-newer` was then merged from https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into itself, as indicated by the merge commit. No new features or modules were added in these commits, only administrative changes were made. The merge commit and the admin update commit are the only changes made in this set of commits.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 3 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The `staging` branch was the focus of the recent work, where the default OpenAI model was updated. Aesthetic bug fixes were also applied to the `staging` branch, as described by the commit message "aesthetic bug fixes". Additionally, the backend handling of insufficient evidence was improved on the `staging` branch, according to the commit message "improve backend handling of insufficient evidence". The `staging` branch saw these specific changes, with no other branches mentioned in the commits. No new features or modules were explicitly mentioned as being added, only the aforementioned updates. The work was solely done on the `staging` branch, with no other branches receiving updates.

3 commit(s) today:

  • f02456c [staging] update default openai model — Jamie Cummins
  • 90c62a8 [staging] aesthetic bug fixes — Jamie Cummins
  • efb74a8 [staging] improve backend handling of insufficient evidence — Jamie Cummins
  • 1f6986b [staging] remove sign-up — Jamie Cummins
  • 717d756 [staging] user survey improvment — Jamie Cummins
  • 8c5b3bf [staging] additional aesthetic imprvoements — Jamie Cummins
  • adef1de [staging] minor aesthetic improvements — Jamie Cummins
  • a3141f9 [staging] fix quote tracing — Jamie Cummins
  • a8a5cbe [staging] improve report retention — Jamie Cummins
  • d6c7e96 [staging] add multi-file upload — Jamie Cummins
  • 72f7d60 [staging] add advanced error handling and regeneration — Jamie Cummins
  • f0792b4 [staging] add html export for report; various QOL improvements — Jamie Cummins
  • ae1de84 [staging] hardening multi-study extractions — Jamie Cummins
  • 2516dd5 [staging] Update .gitignore — Jamie Cummins
  • d1ee701 [staging] improve report text normalisation — Jamie Cummins
  • fc0bb51 [staging] fix quote pop-ups — Jamie Cummins
  • a8b610a [staging] update quote chunking and UI output — Jamie Cummins
  • c920500 [staging] embeddings experimentation — Jamie Cummins
  • d5e2697 [staging] update report render — Jamie Cummins
  • e3f869b [staging] improvements based on Matilda suggestions — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
